race.comment: CHIPILLY (5) bolted in fresh over 1100m and then stepped out to 1300m last start and repeated the dose. Back to 1200m here, though she possesses good early speed and will be able to offset the tricky draw. In hot form and there's no reason why she can't bring up the hat-trick. MARINES CRY (1) is another in winning form, scoring by 1.2L in a similar race last start. She was a $1.75 favourite there and Riordan's claim comes in handy. Expect her to roll forward from the barrier and be in this for a very long way. GIBRALTAR GOLD (2) got over the top to score over 1300m fresh and Yuill hops in the saddle, replacing the apprentice today. Needs some luck from the barrier but she rates highly on the latest win. Can build on that effort. THE LIONS' GATE (4) is another who'll need some luck from out wide but should be fitter now and can feature. SUNSHINE TAFE (8) is next best.
